subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent forth a fragrant breath from the holy fragrances of this exalted Paradise that the world may be perfumed in these days when the Temple of Immortality hath been established
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @pain of love; love as veil, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
